response.step_by_step_log:
1. Scene detection: Identified two distinct song segments: 00:00-02:33 and 02:34-04:54.
2. Song Identification: Song 2 identified as '罪と罰' by Sheena Ringo (credit on screen at 02:36). Song 1 remained unidentified despite search efforts using lyrics snippets found in the video.
3. Lyrics Lookup: Searched for lyrics for '罪と罰' and found them easily. For Song 1, searches for the lyrics snippet "硝子のうえを裸足のまま歩く" did not yield a matching song title.
4. JSON Construction: Created the JSON structure including the metadata and lyrics for '罪と罰' and placeholders for the unidentified song.
response.global_summary: The video features two VTuber performers in a stage setting, singing two different songs. The first song is an unidentified track, followed by a performance of "罪と罰" (Tsumi to Batsu) by Sheena Ringo.

scenes.description: The video begins with two VTuber performers singing an unidentified Japanese song. They are on a stage with a rose motif.
The second song, '罪と罰' (Tsumi to Batsu) by Sheena Ringo, begins. The performers interact with a car prop on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
頬を刺す朝の山手通り
煙草の空き箱を捨てる
今日もまた足の踏み場は無い
小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
「不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
未来等 見ないで
確信出来る現在だけ重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って必要なのは是だけ認めて」
愛してる独り泣き喚いて
夜道を弄れど虚しい
改札の安蛍光灯は
貴方の影すら落さない
歪んだ無常の遠き日も
セヴンスターの香り
味わう如く季節を呼び起こす
あたしが望んだこと自体
矛盾を優に超えて
一番愛しいあなたの声迄
掠れさせて居たのだろう
静寂を破るドイツ車とパトカー
サイレン 爆音 現実界 或る浮游
確信出来る 現在だけ 重ねて
確信出来る 現在だけ 重ねて
確信出来る 現在だけ 重ねて
[...歌詞は続く...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Stinging the cheeks, the morning Yamate Street
I throw away the empty cigarette box
Again today, there is no place for my feet to stand
My small room spoils my loneliness
"Don't love the unsettling screams
Don't look at the future or anything
Just stack up the only present I can be sure of
Call my name properly
Touch my body
Recognize that this is all that is needed"
I'm in love, crying out alone
Even if I wander the night road, it's empty
The cheap fluorescent light of the ticket gate
Doesn't even cast your shadow
Even in the distorted, impermanent, distant days
The scent of Seven Stars
Calls up the seasons as if to taste them
The very thing I wished for
Easily surpassed my own contradictions
Perhaps I had even rasped away the voice of the person I loved most
Cars and police cars breaking the silence
Sirens, roaring sounds, the reality world, some floating
Stack up the only present I can be sure of
Stack up the only present I can be sure of
Stack up the only present I can be sure of
[...lyrics continue...]
